instruction: Explain the impact using correct acronyms where applicable.
input: wolfSSL wolfMQTT 1.9 has a heap-based buffer overflow (4 bytes) in MqttDecode_Publish (called from MqttClient_DecodePacket and MqttClient_HandlePacket).
output: A heap-based buffer overflow can lead to potential Remote Code Execution (RCE) or Denial of Service (DoS), depending on how the memory is corrupted.
